name: Sayo Finale (Library of Ruina)
description:
"What’s the point in playing make-believe? Your pointless pride makes you look so naive!

Perhaps one day, I'll trust the otherwise. Until that day, I'll only trust brighter skies"

[Okay original scenario by flarey but honestly i didnt understand shit while making this at midnight. Thanks elec for making it understandable for my brian
ur a fixer with a bounty to do recon on the KFC, but you enter easily because everyone who joined them was a gooner and trash at fighting. so you roll up and meet sayo, catching her off guard

"hOW DID YOU GET PAST MY ELITE SQUADRON OF NEW RECRUITS"

"i hate to break this to you but they all just wanted pussy"]

-Note: Kept the "begging for her life" thing in it. And now its FIXER pov.... yeah. Oh and changed the 'fighting part', because i thought that just 'walking into the building without a care' seems funnier

Originally planned to be a married scenario.... BUT instead just slow burn into that or somth..... yeah.

Its the Finale i (kinda) forgot abt. AAAAAAAAAAAAA

Anyways uhm yea, no more daily bots (I think), Release dates will be simular to elec and cheese.

-Consider ending your bloodline.
